detail.description: Tyler Callihan doubles (3) on a line drive to left fielder Mauricio Dubón. Nick Gonzales to 3rd.
Tyler Callihan singles on a fly ball to center fielder Michael Harris II. Billy Cook to 3rd. Nick Gonzales to 2nd.
Tyler Callihan singles on a line drive to left fielder José Azócar.
Tyler Callihan triples (2) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Luke Raley. Endy Rodríguez scores.
Tyler Callihan singles on a soft ground ball to left fielder Heriberto Hernández. Nick Gonzales to 3rd.
Tyler Callihan singles on a ground ball to left fielder Heriberto Hernández.
Tyler Callihan singles on a ground ball to left fielder Heriberto Hernández. Endy Rodríguez to 2nd.
Tyler Callihan triples (1) on a fly ball to right fielder Kyle Tucker.
Tyler Callihan homers (2) on a fly ball to right field. Nick Gonzales scores. Rafael Flores Jr. scores.
Tyler Callihan homers (1) on a fly ball to right field.
Tyler Callihan doubles (1) on a fly ball to center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong. Jhostynxon Garcia scores.
Tyler Callihan singles on a ground ball to right fielder James Wood. Ryan O'Hearn scores. Nick Gonzales scores.
Tyler Callihan singles on a bunt ground ball to third baseman Curtis Mead. Nick Gonzales to 3rd. Jake Mangum to 2nd.
Tyler Callihan singles on a line drive to right fielder Lawrence Butler.
Tyler Callihan singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Henry Bolte.
Tyler Callihan singles on a line drive to right fielder Tyler Freeman. Nick Gonzales scores. Endy Rodríguez out at 3rd on the throw, right fielder Tyler Freeman to third baseman Kyle Karros.
Tyler Callihan doubles (4) on a fly ball to right fielder Chase DeLauter, deflected by center fielder Kahlil Watson.

Tyler Callihan doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Ronald Acuña Jr. Nick Gonzales scores. Oneil Cruz out at home on the throw, right fielder Ronald Acuña Jr. to first baseman Matt Olson to catcher Austin Wynns.
